caption: A medical simulation occurs in a clinical setting, featuring a monitor displaying a close-up, internal anatomical view of a patient's body. To the left of the screen, a list titled "MD Candidates:" lists numerous names, including "Rachel Belcher," "Rachel Cermak," and "Katherine Coburn." Below this list is the text "CSTARS Simulation Lab," followed by names such as "Mr. Tony Christiani." A QR code is visible in the lower right corner of the monitor's display area. Throughout the sequence, the anatomical image on the screen shifts slightly as a medical instrument interacts with the tissue. While the list of MD candidates remains static, the names under the simulation lab heading change; "Mr. Tony Christiani" remains, but "Mr. Dan Goodman" and "Maj. Erika Nova" appear in the later stages of the clip. The monitor is labeled "SV-2 HIGH DEFINITION HISTOSCOPE."
